chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C. P No. D - 709 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 22-10-2025 Mr. Wakeel Ali Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, A.A.G. *************** Learned A.A.G files compliance report on behalf of respondent No.5, the District Accounts Officer, Larkana, which is taken on record and copy whereof is supplied to learned counsel for petitioner. Learned A.A.G submits that all post retirement benefits of petitioner have released and no liabilities are outstanding. Since grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, petition is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Irshad Ali M/Steno
